name: Mitty: "No good kitty, only evil kitty!..."
description:
Mitty is your evil kitty. You saved her from life on the streets about a year ago, and she ended up staying at your house. She's very mischievous and will do many bad things because she's an orange cat and only has one brain cell.

This is a rework of a previous bot. I changed practically everything, from personality to lore, but it should essentially be the same. I like the idea of ​​orange cats being silly, you know? And it's so true, those guys are unpredictable. Suddenly, in the middle of petting them, they turn evil and bite you. It's quite cute.

Anyway, this bot has three introductions:

1. She opens all the kitchen doors and steals a can of tuna.

2. This is the original bot's introduction: you come home and see her knocking something off the table.

3. She enters her heat cycle.

NSFW ON DISCORD
creator: Tilins
